noModel.title: No model configured
noModel.sub: Add a model from one of your configured providers to start chatting.

user.label: You
user.editTitle: Edit & resend (truncates everything after this turn)

rollback.confirmMessage: The response and your message will be removed. Your text will be restored to the input so you can edit and resend.
rollback.undoConfirmMessage: The last response and your message will be removed. Your text will be restored to the input so you can edit and resend.

limit.banner: Hit the per-turn tool-call limit ({{limit}}). How do you want to proceed?

partial.interrupted: This turn was interrupted (connection dropped or server restarted).
partial.emptyResponse: The model returned an empty response.
partial.length: Response was truncated — the model hit its output limit.
partial.upstreamTimeout: The model didn't respond in time.
partial.rateLimited: Rate limit hit — the turn has been paused. Resume after the cooldown.
partial.contextOverflow: This conversation is getting too long for the model to keep track of everything.
partial.messageTooLarge: This message is too large to send.
partial.budgetExceeded: Your API budget has been exceeded. Top up your credits or switch providers to continue.
partial.proceed: How do you want to proceed?

secret.title: This looks like an API key
secret.message: The text you're about to send contains {{preview}}, which matches a known credential pattern. Sending it would expose the key to the LLM (and to its provider's logging policy). You can save it locally and use {{placeholder}} as a placeholder instead — the value is substituted at the tool boundary, never sent to the LLM.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.blocked: Notifications blocked — enable them in your browser's site settings to receive prompts when no Nexus tab is open.
notifications.openChatTitle: Open the chat that produced this request
notifications.parkedTitle: Parked: agent's turn ended; resume any time.
notifications.liveTitle: Live: agent's turn is blocked waiting on this answer.
